channel.title: INfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why JPMorgan says the international stock story still has legs
item.description: Decent growth, benign inflation, a dovish Fed and a weaker dollar all favor equities but international and emerging stocks look set to build on the ou...

item.title: Former Canada PM Justin Trudeau buys a $3.1 million home in Montreal—will he live there with Katy Perry?
item.description: Justin Trudeau has forked over $3.1 million for an expansive estate in Montreal’s exclusive Outremont neighborhood—and got the seal of approval from g...

item.title: ‘I spend $7,500 a month’: I’m 47, earn $260K, and have $3 million. Can I retire at 50?
item.description: “I own a home worth $520,000 and do not have a mortgage on it.”

item.title: Here are the five companies that $9 trillion of funds agree on right now
item.description: Vertiv has been a top holding among hedge and mutual funds in the first quarter of this year so far, and a lucrative one.

item.title: Novo Nordisk pitted a new weight-loss drug against Eli Lilly’s — and lost
item.description: Novo Nordisk shares were under pressure on Monday as the struggling Danish pharmaceutical said a head-to-head study found a drug in development didn’t...

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
